PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jun-15-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

This matter was set for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated September 7, 2020, is admitted to probate. Robert Eric Raymond is appointed as Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Karen Ann Simons is appointed probate referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for June 21, 2022, at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is filed two weeks prior, the status hearing will be taken off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar May-19-2021 Continued To Jun-15-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
